scripts.dev: concurrently -n participant,projector,organizer -c cyan,magenta,green "npm run dev --workspace=participant" "npm run dev --workspace=projector" "npm run dev --workspace=organizer"
scripts.dev:full: concurrently -n backend,participant,projector,organizer -c yellow,cyan,magenta,green "npm run dev --workspace=backend" "npm run dev --workspace=participant" "npm run dev --workspace=projector" "npm run dev --workspace=organizer"
